meaning: n.古代蒙古帝国旧都遗迹
examples: Other Karakorum climbing permits include an all-women team, and some familiar names.
In China such landform is mainly developed in glaciers on north face of Mount Qomolangma and on the Karakorum Mountains.
The Mongolian empire capital KaraKorum is worlds famous capital city in 13 centuries, has the profound influence and the important status in the world history.
